headline: Exelon Could Reach $58 by End of 2026 as AI Data Center Demand Fuels 26% Load Growth in Illinois
summary: Exelon Corporation (NASDAQ:EXC) has gained 9.90% year-to-date and 9.65% over the past year, with shares currently trading at $48.27. The stock hit a 52-week high of $50.65 earlier in March, still well below where one major Wall Street firm now sees it heading. The Street’s average price target sits at $50.88, with 11 of 20 ... Exelon Could Reach $58 by End of 2026 as AI Data Center Demand Fuels 26% Load Growth in Illinois

headline: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Airbnb, ARM Holdings, Bank of America, CAVA Group, Robinhood Markets, Spotify, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower as we head into Thursday, and depending on today’s narrative about how the war in Iran is progressing, whatever is revealed could chart the stock market’s course once again. Stocks were up across the board on Wednesday after the United States announced a 15-point peace plan for Iran, ... headline: How The Exelon (EXC) Investment Story Is Evolving With New Targets And Grid Projects
summary: Exelon’s fair value estimate has shifted slightly, moving from US$50.44 to US$50.88 per share, alongside a series of refreshed price targets from research houses. Analysts lifting targets into the low to high US$50s, as well as those holding more cautious stances with targets from US$44 to US$53, are tying their views to updated assumptions on execution, capital spending and regulatory trends. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moves and track the evolving story around...
